tasks.title: Batch9 QA consolidation replay 1 (API/admin + web contracts)
tasks.prompt: Execute one MVP slice only: run consolidated validation replay for batch9 lanes A/B in current state, capture exact outputs, and publish dated handoff. No behavior changes unless gate fix required.
tasks.verifyCommand: pnpm run docs:lint && pnpm run infra-policy-check && pnpm --filter api test -- registrar.controller.test.ts registrar.service.test.ts && pnpm --filter web test -- registrar-client.test.ts registrar-contract-inventory.test.ts && pnpm --filter api typecheck && pnpm --filter web typecheck

tasks.title: Batch9 risk/rollback memo 1 (lanes A/B)
tasks.prompt: Execute one MVP slice only: produce risk-first review memo for completed batch9 lane A/B slices with severity-ordered findings, residual risks/testing gaps, and rollback guidance.
tasks.verifyCommand: pnpm run docs:lint && pnpm run infra-policy-check && pnpm --filter api typecheck && pnpm --filter web typecheck

tasks.verifyCommand: pnpm run docs:lint && pnpm run infra-policy-check && pnpm --filter api typecheck && pnpm --filter web typecheck

tasks.title: Registrar spec implemented-now sync after batch9
tasks.prompt: Execute one MVP slice only: update docs/specs/system/registrar.md implemented-now/deferred wording to match completed batch9 slices with no speculative claims; docs-only consistency pass.
tasks.verifyCommand: pnpm run docs:lint && pnpm run infra-policy-check && pnpm --filter api typecheck && pnpm --filter web typecheck

tasks.title: Batch9 final targeted gate replay and closeout

tasks.verifyCommand: pnpm run docs:lint && pnpm run infra-policy-check && pnpm --filter api test -- registrar.controller.test.ts registrar.service.test.ts && pnpm --filter web test -- registrar-client.test.ts registrar-contract-inventory.test.ts && pnpm --filter api typecheck && pnpm --filter web typecheck
